race.comment: FEARED (2) was too good for a maiden field when resuming last start over 1200m at Tamworth, scoring by a head. Sparingly raced and has more to offer. Can go right on with the job now. CALL ME TERRY (5) was beaten  2.6 lengths last start at this over 1300m track and is down in weight this time. Has more up the sleeve and not to be discounted. BOUNDING BON (1) improved again missing by 1L here over 1000m. Had a tough run from the 12 gate and draws inside today. The longer sprint looks to suit. WOLF BAY (4) is third-up and made good improvement at Mudgee. He'd been off the scene for a long while and will be fitter again.
